---
title: "Research"
description: "Research in labor economics, economic history, education, and workforce development."

listing:
  contents:
    - "papers/*.qmd"
  template: paper-listing.ejs.md
  sort: "order asc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  page-size: 20
  feed: false
---

My research lies at the intersection of labor economics, economic history, and the economics of education. I study how public policy and educational institutions shape human-capital investment and labor-market outcomes.
